    {
      "question": "What does 'Copy-on-write' (CoW) achieve in a file system?",
      "options": ["Improves performance by reducing disk writes", "Enhances file system security by making backups of all changes", "Ensures data integrity by making a copy of changes before applying them", "Increases storage capacity by allowing multiple versions of files"],
      "correct": 2,
      "explanation": "Copy-on-write ensures data integrity by making a copy of changes before apply
